---
title: "Blog"
description-meta: "Notas y escritos — próximamente."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-shell">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Blog</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Blog</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap blog-body" data-lang="en">
    <p class="blog-coming-soon">*Coming soon*</p>
  </section>

  <section class="page-wrap blog-body" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <p class="blog-coming-soon">*Coming soon*</p>
  </section>
</div>
```
